key.name: catalog-url
key.summary: URL of the remote catalog manifest
key.description: Where the app fetches the game catalog from. Falls back to the bundled and cached copies when unreachable.

key.name: favorites
key.summary: Title IDs the user has starred

key.name: recent
key.summary: Recently played title IDs, most-recent first

key.name: last-catalog-refresh
key.summary: Unix time of the last successful catalog refresh
